name: mend-a11y
description: Find accessibility issues on the active page and learn how to fix them.

scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run package
scripts.preversion: npm run build && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: tsx test/pipeline.test.ts && tsx test/timeout.test.ts && tsx test/docs.test.ts && tsx test/textSpacing.test.ts && tsx test/focusOrder.test.ts && tsx test/outline.test.ts && tsx test/vision.test.ts && tsx test/tabState.test.ts && tsx test/sync.test.ts && tsx test/contract.test.ts
